positive: A stylized, high-contrast depiction of a majestic mountain range at sunrise. The composition should feature clean, defined silhouettes of the peaks against a vibrant gradient sky of deep indigo, fiery orange, and soft lavender. Incorporate stylized, abstract geometric elements that blend into the mountain peaks, suggesting constellations or flowing energy. Use flat graphic design aesthetics combined with photorealistic texture for the sky gradient. The foreground should include a minimalist, central element, perhaps a single, stylized stylized pine tree or a geometric zen stone arrangement, emphasizing symmetry and negative space. The overall mood is epic, spiritual, and tranquil. Style: Linocut print meets contemporary graphic illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition: Centered, strong contrast, vertical impact.
negative: blur, text, signature, watermark, logos, trademarks, artifacts, noise, poor anatomy, messy, grainy, extra limbs, bad details, low quality, poor composition, photographic photo
